issue_title: Example Product | Delayed mobile badge counts
symptoms: Some agents may see stale mobile badge counts for up to five minutes after a conversation is reassigned from a team inbox.
workaround: Ask the agent to pull to refresh the inbox. If the count stays stale for more than ten minutes, collect the app version and device operating system.

issue_title: Example Product | Export ready email missing for some domains
symptoms: Admins on strict mail gateways may not receive the export ready email even though the export completes successfully.
workaround: Have the admin open Reports > Exports and download the completed export directly from the export history table.

issue_title: Example Product | Mobile queued reply badge may persist
symptoms: Some agents may continue to see a pending badge after a queued mobile reply has already synced.
workaround: Ask the agent to pull to refresh the conversation. If the badge remains after ten minutes, collect the app version, device operating system, and conversation ID.
